title: begonia ferruginea
intro: Begonia ferruginea, also known as the iron begonia, is a species of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Begonia ferruginea include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional medicine, Begonia ferruginea is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its leaves are also used in poultices and topical applications to treat skin conditions.
